The incest is covered up by having all the priests and other men make love to Julia as well, so that if she becomes pregnant, no one can claim her father is the father. This plan is orchestrated by Father Ambrose and agreed to by Bella, ensuring the true parentage remains ambiguous. Thus, the group's collective involvement serves to obscure any potential evidence of Delmont's incest. 

\boxed{\text{All the priests and men make love to Julia so that no one can claim her father is the father if she becomes pregnant.}}
